title: AssetBindingRegistry
description: Minimal binding registry interface for the Discovery Log. Maps entity_type_id to permanently bound portrait, voice profile, and map token assets. Bindings are deterministic (same world_seed + entity_type_id = same binding) and permanent for the campaign lifetime. Interface-only — does not define asset generation or rendering.

AssetBindingRegistry.title: AssetBindingRegistry
AssetBindingRegistry.description: Top-level registry of all entity-to-asset bindings for a campaign. Grows as new entity types are encountered. Entries are never removed or rebound.

world_seed.description: World seed used for deterministic binding selection. Combined with entity_type_id and asset_type to produce the binding hash.

bindings.description: Map of entity_type_id → EntityAssetBinding. One entry per entity type that has been encountered in play.

pool_usage.description: Map of pool_category → number of items consumed. Tracks pool exhaustion.

last_updated.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent binding.

EntityAssetBinding.title: EntityAssetBinding
EntityAssetBinding.description: Complete asset binding for a single entity type. Created on first knowledge event for any player. Permanent and immutable once created.

entity_type_id.description: References a CanonicalCreatureEntry in the world bundle.

binding_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this binding was created.

portrait_binding.description: Portrait asset binding across all quality tiers.

voice_binding.description: Voice profile binding. Null if entity type has no voice (non-speaking creatures).

PortraitBinding.title: PortraitBinding
PortraitBinding.description: Portrait binding across all quality tiers. Each tier is a separate asset reference. The Discovery Log selects which tier to display based on the player's knowledge stage.

pool_category.description: Asset pool category used for selection. Derived from entity's primary taxonomy_tag.

fallback.description: True if this binding was resolved from a _fallback pool instead of the primary pool.

placeholder.description: True if no pool was available and this binding uses a generic placeholder.

tiers.description: Asset references for each quality tier.

PortraitTiers.title: PortraitTiers
PortraitTiers.description: Asset references for each portrait quality tier. The Discovery Log maps knowledge stages to these tiers: heard_of→silhouette, observed→sketch, engaged→detailed, studied→full.

silhouette.description: Solid dark shape. No identifying features. Used at heard_of stage.

sketch.description: Partial detail. Shape and coloring visible. Used at observed stage. Null falls back to silhouette.

detailed.description: Full visual with identifiable features. Used at engaged stage. Null falls back to sketch.

full.description: Complete high-detail rendering. Used at studied stage. Null falls back to detailed.

VoiceBinding.title: VoiceBinding
VoiceBinding.description: Voice profile binding for a speaking entity. Voice is not tiered by knowledge stage — it always plays at full quality. Only the visual attribution context changes per stage.

pool_category.description: Asset pool category used for selection. Derived from entity's primary taxonomy_tag.

voice_profile_id.description: Reference to the VoicePersona record in the immersion system.

fallback.description: True if resolved from a _fallback pool.

placeholder.description: True if no pool was available. Voice playback disabled; text-only attribution.

TokenBinding.title: TokenBinding
TokenBinding.description: Map token binding for battle map display.

pool_category.description: Asset pool category. Derived from entity's size_class.

tiers.description: Asset references for each token quality tier.

fallback.description: True if resolved from a _fallback pool.

placeholder.description: True if no pool was available. Generic circle token used.

TokenTiers.title: TokenTiers
TokenTiers.description: Asset references for each token quality tier. Maps to knowledge stages: heard_of→silhouette, observed→outline, engaged→colored, studied→full.

silhouette.description: Dark shape token. Used at heard_of stage.

outline.description: Outline token with shape visible. Used at observed stage.

colored.description: Full-color token. Used at engaged stage.

full.description: High-detail token. Used at studied stage.

AssetRef.title: AssetRef
AssetRef.description: Reference to an asset in the asset store.

asset_id.description: Asset identifier in the campaign asset store. Matches AssetRecord.asset_id.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the asset content for integrity verification. Null if not yet generated.

description: Schema for the entity-to-asset binding registry. Maps entity types to permanently bound portrait, voice, and token assets. Deterministic selection ensures reproducibility. Interface-only — does not define asset generation, rendering, or storage format.
